name: judge
description: Automated code review agent orchestrating tri-engine parallel review (Codex + Gemini + Claude Code) via subagents with grounding verification that ships only findings worth fixing.
tagline: Sages read intent, not just text.

capabilities.summary: Codex + Gemini + Claude Code subagents with NORMALIZE→CLUSTER→GROUND→ARBITRATE pipeline
Judge-context verification of CANDIDATE findings against actual code
SAST+LLM layered approach with 91% FP reduction benchmark
Elevated scrutiny for AI-generated code (logic, security, perf)
Verify absent defenses (missing validation, sanitization, error handling)
Paste-ready LLM Fix Prompt for consensus-level findings
